creator: agh@riseup.net
text: OK, I have managed to unbundle GENie from the MAME build, and rely on devel/genie instead, however, I have had to use the GENie patches from MAME for devel/genie so MAME builds. I also updated the GENie port. But there are still problems with using devel/genie that I am still looking into, namely that the MAME build want's to regenerate everything again, but slower, and then only build with one CPU. Still could be sometime. Still unsure if this is the correct route.
